name: SmartRent, Inc.
business: We are an enterprise real estate technology company that provides a comprehensive management platform designed for property owners, managers and residents. Our suite of products and services includes cloud-based software-as-a-service solutions many of which are enabled by smart building hardware, and we generate revenue from sales of smart home systems to property owners and property managers.

exposures.sentence: Our platform drives these benefits through a variety of connected devices, including smart thermostats, leak sensors, smart appliances and smart lighting.
In June 2025, we introduced an AI-powered intelligence layer and enhanced energy management tools designed to empower operators.
Smart Communities Solutions include software and devices that power... community and resident WiFi.

In prior periods, the increased demand for electronics as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, U.S. trade relations with China and certain other factors led to a global shortage of semiconductors, including Z wave chips, which are a central component of our Hub Devices.
We are subject to legal obligations and laws and regulations related to privacy and cybersecurity, and any actual or perceived failure to meet those obligations could harm our business.
